_README: Gradaroo dataset. QS column = QS World University Rankings 2026 (released June 2025). 'qs' is null where the institution is not QS-ranked. Curated universities (CDU, Tasmania, James Cook, Charles Sturt, University of New England, CQUniversity, Federation) have employer lists compiled from public regional employment sources; other universities show the state's largest graduate employers as a labelled approximation. 'region' feeds the Adzuna 'where' parameter. Employer data is compiled from PUBLIC sources, never scraped from LinkedIn.
